config.section.n8n.label: n8n
config.n8n.info_text: n8n can connect to AuraGo as an AI backend. AuraGo can also trigger n8n webhooks on events. The API token protects the AuraGo n8n endpoint — copy it into your n8n credential.
config.n8n.readonly_hint: When active, n8n can only read data — no chats, tool execution, or writes.
config.n8n.require_token_hint: Require Bearer token authentication for all n8n requests (strongly recommended).
config.n8n.webhook_url_hint: Base URL of your n8n instance for outgoing webhook triggers.
config.n8n.rate_limit_hint: Maximum requests per second from n8n. Set to 0 for unlimited.
config.n8n.token_hint: Generate a token here and enter it as the Bearer token in your n8n AuraGo credential.
config.n8n.token_generated: Token generated — copy it now, it won't be shown again

config.github.owner_hint: GitHub no yuuza mei matawa soshiki mei
config.github.token_hint: Personal Access Token (PAT) - Vault ni ango-ka shite hozon
config.github.token_empty: Token wo kara ni suru koto wa dekimasen
config.github.token_save_failed: Token no hozon ni shippai shimashita
config.github.base_url_hint: GitHub Enterprise no baai nomi henkou shite kudasai. Default: https://api.github.com
config.github.default_private_label: Atarashii repo wo default de private ni
config.github.default_private_hint: Yuko na baai, atarashiku sakusei sareta repo wa private ni settei saremasu
config.github.allowed_repos_desc: Agent wa koko ni kisai sareta repo nomi ni akusesu dekimasu. Agent ga sakusei shita repo wa tsuneni kyoka saremasu. Risuto ga kara no baai, agent wa jibun ga sakusei shita repo nomi ni akusesu dekimasu.
config.github.fetch_to_edit_hint: Risuto wo henshuu suru ni wa Repo wo shutoku wo kurikku shite kudasai
config.github.repos_list_empty: GitHub repo wo yomikomi suru ni wa Repo wo shutoku wo kurikku shite kudasai
config.github.agent_created_note: Agent ga sakusei shita repo wa, meijiteki na shounin nashi demo tsuneni akusesu kanou desu.
